name: takawasi enemy intelligence doctrine QA
scope: Desktop QA only. Mobile QA is outside the active target.

steps: Reset campaign from the Theater UI.
Opened Camp Doctrine and verified the new 敵情分析 row.
Invested the starting doctrine point into 敵情分析.
Returned to Theater and assigned 東方辺境猟兵隊 plus ケラー to the recon side operation.
Opened Camp and Deployment, started the mandatory battle, withdrew, opened After Action, and applied the result.
Returned to Theater and inspected turn 2 initial enemy intel.

afterInvestment.strategicDoctrineSummary: 小任務判断+6、敵情分析+1/偵察教訓+6/偵察任務+4

nextTurn.preparationMessage: 敵情分析班が戦区情報を整理。初期敵情+2、教訓値6。
nextTurn.mainEnemyLabel: 敵編成 群集+銃兵+突破体 / 偵察照合済み / 群集3-5 / 銃兵2-4 / 突破体1-3
nextTurn.mainSpoilsSummary: 主戦場後の敵遺棄装備を回収可能 / 参謀偵察教訓を反映
